title: Wildflower Honey Jar
description: Homemade wildflower honey harvested from a local beekeeper and packaged in a small home kitchen.

reviews.name: Alicia
reviews.text: Amazing homemade quality! Supports local entrepreneurship.

title: Handwoven Clay Vase
description: Each vase is individually hand-thrown and painted by Priya, a local woman entrepreneur working from her home studio.

reviews.name: Daniel
reviews.text: Beautiful! Supporting a talented local artisan.

title: Golden Sourdough Loaf
description: Traditional slow-fermented sourdough baked fresh every morning in Arun's home bakery using ancestral recipes.

reviews.name: Sofia
reviews.text: Tastes like homemade bread! Arun is an amazing local baker.

title: Garden Herb Candle
description: Hand-poured soy candles made by Ritu in her small home workshop with natural herbs and essential oils.

reviews.name: Mina
reviews.text: Perfect! Supporting a talented home entrepreneur.

title: Rosemary Olive Oil
description: Cold-pressed olive oil infused with homegrown rosemary, made by Sunita's family farm in small batches.

reviews.name: Nora
reviews.text: Delicious! Supporting a small local farm.

title: Bright Ceramic Mug
description: Hand-thrown ceramic mug made by Vikram in his personal pottery studio with a cheerful handmade glaze.

reviews.name: James
reviews.text: Beautiful handmade piece from a talented local potter.

description: A hand-thrown mug with a cheerful glaze finish for daily rituals.

reviews.name: James
reviews.text: Lovely mug with a premium feel.
